headline: From Hold To Buy: Why I'm Turning Bullish On Palantir
summary: Palantir Technologies Inc. shifts to product-led AI software as AIP expands TAM over $1T; solid margins and $10B Army deal add stability. Click for a PLTR update.

headline: The Bull Case For Salesforce (CRM) Could Change Following Debt-Funded $25 Billion Buyback And Refinancing Transaction
summary: In March 2026, Salesforce funded a record-setting US$25.00 billion accelerated share repurchase by issuing multi-tranche senior notes maturing between 2028 and 2066 and arranging a new US$6.00 billion five-year term loan to refinance existing debt. This pairing of very large debt issuance with an equally large ASR materially reshapes Salesforce’s capital structure while signaling management’s conviction in the durability of its cash generation and AI-driven product strategy. We’ll now...

headline: Is Veeva Systems (VEEV) A Good Stock To Buy Now?
summary: Is VEEV a good stock to buy? We came across a bullish thesis on Veeva Systems Inc. on LongTermValue Research’s Substack. In this article, we will summarize the bulls’ thesis on VEEV. Veeva Systems Inc.’s share was trading at $185.28 as of March 16th. VEEV’s trailing and forward P/E were 34.06 and 20.92 respectively according to Yahoo Finance. […]

headline: Why Intuit says it is insulated from AI disruption
summary: Investing.com -- Intuit (NASDAQ:INTU) pushed back against fears of AI-driven disruption, saying its business operates in a distinct category where users “buy confidence,” not software, given the high cost of getting financial decisions wrong, the company told Investing.com.

headline: Kore.ai Launches Agent Management Platform to Bring Governance and Control to Enterprise AI
summary: ORLANDO, Fla., March 17, 2026--Kore.ai, a provider of agentic applications and a market-leading enterprise AI platform, today announced the launch of its Agent Management Platform, a unified command center designed to govern, monitor, and manage AI agents and AI systems across the enterprise.
